response.justification: While Bogdan is an experienced full-stack software engineer with 14+ years of experience and strong fundamentals in systems programming (C, C++, D), his entire career trajectory is in application-layer software development (web, mobile, GIS platforms, direct mail automation). This Principal role requires specialized expertise in SoC and IP modeling, GPU architecture analysis, deep learning workload optimization, and AI accelerator design—domains completely absent from his resume. The gap between his application-software background and the hardware-focused responsibilities is too fundamental to overcome at a Principal level.
strengths: Experienced full-stack engineer (14+ years) with demonstrated mastery of systems programming languages (C, C++, D) and ability to deliver across multiple complex domains
Proven track record optimizing performance-critical systems, including low-latency microservices infrastructure handling millions of requests per second at Dunnhumby
Meets educational baseline requirement (BS Computer Science from IIT Bombay) and demonstrates ability to rapidly learn and contribute at senior technical levels
concerns: Zero background in hardware architecture, SoC design, or semiconductor systems—the core technical domain of this role
Career entirely focused on application-layer development with no progression toward hardware systems or performance modeling; would require fundamental domain retooling
Missing all preferred qualifications: no SIMD/MIMD architecture experience, no deep learning workload expertise, no GPU architecture or AI accelerator background

key_factors.factor: AI accelerator and GPU architecture knowledge
Systems programming and low-latency optimization experience
